llm_eval.notes: 実read。frontmatter健全: owner_skill:run-dev-graph-sync(実在), source #C07実在, tools=Read,Bash, isolation:fork。責務はtracker_bindingごとの単一authority(beads=C28/github=C12/none=external write無)排他性検証に集中, 非担当(Issue/Project/Beads mutation, conflict自動解消)を明示。参照実在: references/execution-tracker-contract.md存在。error-handling優秀: Layer4で双方変更をmanual conflict化, Status-onlyをcompletion authorityにしない, dry-run write/duplicate linkage/closed-unmerged done/parity不明のいずれかでFAIL — silent overwriteと二重writer検出という目的に整合。副作用安全: read-only再計算のみ, 外部write command非実行, mutationはC12/C28/C26 ownerへ委譲。checklist5項(writer一意/3-way manual conflict/dry-run再実行external write=0/tombstone・retry・merge evidence契約一致/edge exact-set parity)が再現可能evidence基準。CI lintで機械被覆済のためmechanical:true。
